serena_lsp: 23 tools stable R4-32. activate_project --project ~1.3-7s warm. find_symbol broad 70s+ (prefer Grep). Receiver methods need '(*Type).method'. search_for_pattern great for cross-linter pattern audits.

open_issues.sg32a1_R32: execcommandwithoutcontext (24th linter) NIL-GUARD FALSE POSITIVE: flags exec.Command in else-branch of `if ctx!=nil{CommandContext}else{Command}` (or then-branch of `if ctx==nil`). Autofix replaces with exec.CommandContext(ctx,...) but ctx is provably nil on that path -> exec.CommandContext PANICS('nil Context'). Concrete FP: pkg/workflow/github_cli.go:32 setupGHCommand (intentional dual-path: ExecGH(nil) vs ExecGHContext(ctx); ExecGH carries //nolint:staticcheck). Fix: in run() skip exec.Command when call is control-flow-guarded by ctx-nil check, OR when same func already contains exec.CommandContext on that ctx (dual-path indicator). Add testdata. Single-file precision -> proven-to-land template.
open_issues.sg32a2_R32: execcommandwithoutcontext enforce-readiness: 2 GENUINE violations connectStdioMCPServer (pkg/cli/mcp_inspect_mcp.go:150 docker, :155 direct) — ctx from context.WithTimeout(Background,30s) NEVER nil -> safe convert to exec.CommandContext(ctx,...) (binds MCP subprocess to timeout). PLUS linter lacks internal/nolint (cannot suppress FP). Roadmap: fix sg32a1 FP + add nolint + convert these 2 -> then enforce in cgo.yml (13th flag). Blocked on sg32a1.

patterns.new_linter_doc_lag: WATCH but NO LONGER AUTOMATIC: confirmed 2x (lenstringzero R30, sortslice R31) but BROKE at R32 — 24th linter execcommandwithoutcontext landed FULLY documented (doc.go 'All 24', README, spec_test 24 entries). Team appears to have internalized sergo doc-sync issues. STILL diff cmd/linters/main.go count vs doc.go 'All N' vs spec_test documentedAnalyzers() len each run, but expect gap=0 now.
patterns.new_linter_precision_audit: Each new linter: check if it matches stdlib pkgs by TYPE (pass.TypesInfo.ObjectOf->PkgName->Imported().Path()) vs syntactic name. execcommandwithoutcontext(R32) uses type identity correctly -> NO syntactic bug. PIVOT: when type-identity is clean, audit CONTROL-FLOW precision (nil-guards, else-branches, dual-path) — found sg32a1 nilguard FP this way. NEW sub-pattern: context-aware linters can FP on intentional nil-fallback APIs.
patterns.nilguard_fp: NEW R32: ctx-propagation linters (execcommandwithoutcontext; watch ctxbackground too) FP on intentional `if ctx!=nil{CtxVariant}else{PlainVariant}` dual-path APIs. Autofix into the nil-path call panics (exec.CommandContext/etc panic on nil ctx). Check each ctx-linter handles guarded fallback.
patterns.precision_fix_lands: Single-file linter precision/enforce fixes land ~1day: sg24a1 R25, sg27a1 R28, sg28a1 R29, sg29a1+a2 R30, sg30a1+a2 R31, sg31a1+a2 R32. Non-near-zero (seenmapbool 60+, sortslice 50+) does NOT auto-land via sergo.
patterns.ci_enforce: cgo.yml:1122 POSITIVE LINTER_FLAGS, R32=12 flags. Append flag for zero-vio linter; convert-to-zero or //nolint first for non-zero.
patterns.cross_bot_dedup: Other bots file overlapping issues (lint-monster #38012/#38014 sort.Slice migration). gh api search/issues -f q= returns {null} sometimes; use gh api repos/.../issues?labels=sergo --jq. Sergo scoped doc-sync+precision+near-zero-enforce (orthogonal to migration).
patterns.team_closes_fast: Sergo issues -> PRs + CLOSED within ~1-2 days; open_issues usually empty. gh api issues?labels=sergo&state=all confirms landings.

bash_policy: Sandbox blocks multi-stmt compounds (`;`/`&&`/for/backtick), ls/mkdir/cat/sed outside repo, git on /tmp, go build. mkdir blocked even w/ dangerouslyDisableSandbox. printf-raw-JSON BLOCKED -> Write payload to /tmp/gh-aw/agent/*.json then `safeoutputs create_issue . < file`. gh issue/search --json 'Malformed version:'; gh api search/issues -f q= -> {null} sometimes; gh api repos/.../issues?labels=sergo --jq WORKS. Glob/Read/Write work on /tmp; bash CANNOT touch /tmp/gh-aw/repo-memory. KEEP MEMORY ~10KB; compact strategies.jsonl to ~3 recent.
